_description: Standing enrollment queue for off-watchlist companies surfaced by the discovery layer. Historically a sighting just got noted in a run file and dead-ended. This file fixes that: feeders append to `pending`; the next run verifies each pending board and either enrolls it (-> watchlist_companies.json + move to `enrolled`) or rejects it (move to `rejected` with a reason so it's never re-evaluated). This is what converts a one-time sighting into permanent daily monitoring.

_feeders.description: Scripts/sources that append to `pending`. All are DISCOVERY FEEDERS (they find companies); the watchlist poller is the durable job source once a company is enrolled.
_feeders.harvest_hn_hiring.py: Monthly. Parses the HN 'Ask HN: Who is hiring?' thread via the Algolia API and extracts (ats, slug) directly from ATS apply links in comments -> directly enrollable. Highest-yield sub-500 source. Run on/after the 1st.
_feeders.poll_remotive.py: Daily. Remotive remote-jobs JSON API. Remotive does NOT expose the ATS link, so it yields NAME-ONLY leads (needs_ats_resolution=true) that the enrollment step must resolve to an ATS before enrolling. (RemoteOK evaluated 2026-06-30 and dropped for data quality.)
_feeders.websearch board dorks: Daily, run by Claude. site:jobs.ashbyhq.com / job-boards.greenhouse.io / jobs.lever.co target-role dorks. Surface unfamiliar companies -> append to pending.

_schema.pending: [{name, ats, slug, source, first_seen, why, [needs_ats_resolution]}] — verify board live + has US-reachable fit-space roles, then enroll or reject. If needs_ats_resolution=true, name-only: resolve the ATS first (site:greenhouse.io OR ashby OR lever <company>).
_schema.enrolled: [{name, ats, slug, enrolled_date, headcount_band}] — audit log; the live entry lives in watchlist_companies.json.
_schema.rejected: [{name, ats, slug, rejected_date, reason, recheck_if_resurfaced}] — don't re-evaluate unless it resurfaces with new roles.

_run_instructions: Each daily run, in Step 1b after reading ATS hits: (1) process every `pending` entry — for name-only leads resolve the ATS first; verify the board (direct ATS API check, or pipeline/verify_workday.py for Workday) is live with US-reachable fit-space roles; look up an approximate headcount_band; then either add it to watchlist_companies.json + move to `enrolled`, or move it to `rejected` with a reason. (2) Run the feeders (harvest_hn_hiring.py monthly, poll_remotive.py daily) + board dorks; append any UNFAMILIAR company (not in watchlist_companies.json, `enrolled`, or `rejected`) to `pending`. (3) Prefer sub-500. Reject Europe/APAC-only boards — their fit roles aren't US-reachable.

pending.name: Gainsight
pending.why: Senior Technical Project Manager - CS platform vendor itself (direct-domain fit). Confirmed real site is gainsight.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/Gainsight_External_Careers (verified via WebSearch 2026-07-06: live roles include Principal CSM (Remote US), Technical Project Manager (Remote US)) but the CXS jobs API returns Cloudflare 403 on direct curl probes - needs a browser-based check (e.g. Chrome MCP) next run, not another curl attempt.
